nl_query: For each course in the current academic year, show the number of students registered, number of scripts attempted, number absent, number barred, and the pass percentage based on published results with final marks at least 40 percent of the paper total.
failed_sql: SELECT au.code AS course_code, au.name AS course_name, COUNT(DISTINCT sc.id) AS registered_students, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS scripts_attempted, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.lifecycle_status = 'ABSENT' THEN a.id END) AS absent_students, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.lifecycle_status = 'BARRED' THEN a.id END) AS barred_students, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.final_marks >= 0.4 * qp.total_marks THEN a.id END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT a.id), 0), 2) AS pass_percentage FROM academic_unit au JOIN student_cache sc ON sc.program_id = au.id JOIN answer_script a ON a.course_id = sc.program_id JOIN exam_schedule_cache esc ON esc.course_id = sc.program_id AND esc.academic_year = '2025-2026' JOIN question_paper qp ON qp.id = esc.qp_id LEFT JOIN result r ON r.script_id = a.id WHERE a.lifecycle_status IN ('ATTEMPTED', 'ABSENT', 'BARRED') AND r.published_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY au.code, au.name ORDER BY pass_percentage DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): exam_schedule_cache.qp_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
